chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-6206 of 2023 Asif Ali Chandio Versus Province of Sindh and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For orders as to maintainability of petition..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 28.10.2024 None present for the petitioner Ms. Wajiha Mahdi, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. On the last date of hearing, petitioner’s counsel was put on notice to satisfy this Court as to the maintainability of this petition, however, today he is called absent. There is no intimation either. The petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
